description: Re-anchor the harness to the live `/model list` runtime regression reported after the AICodeWith catalog landed.
steps: Record in `PROGRESS.md` that the running gateway treated `/model list` as a model switch instead of a listing request.
Replace `PLAN.json` so the active follow-up tracks the runtime `/model` repair rather than the already-completed catalog exposure work.
Preserve the unrelated `tests/test_coding_mode.py` import failure as an existing repository caveat rather than a new blocker introduced by this fix.

description: The active AgentLoop runtime exposes session-scoped model-selection state instead of relying on the stale config-writing `/model` command.
steps: Add the missing model-selection runtime fields and helper methods needed by the current slash-command path.
Restore per-session model/provider persistence and reset behavior without writing `list` or `reset` into the global config.
Ensure system-message and session-key-override flows reuse the stored session selection.

description: The builtin `/model` command supports listing, index selection, reset, and provider-aware switching on the runtime path used by `nanobot gateway`.
steps: Replace the old builtin `/model` implementation that blindly wrote `ctx.args` into `config.agents.defaults.model`.
Return a formatted available-model list for `/model list` and support `/model <number>` resolution against the listed entries.
Keep natural-language model switch aliases aligned with the restored runtime model-selection helpers where practical.

description: The live runtime entrypoints actually provide provider-switch and available-model callbacks to AgentLoop.
steps: Wire `nanobot gateway`, `nanobot serve`, `nanobot agent`, and the SDK facade through the shared provider-switcher helper.
Make the available-model callback tolerant of missing optional config fields in the current schema.
Confirm the runtime list still shows the verified AICodeWith catalog entries.

description: The `/model` regression fix is validated with focused tests and a live tmux gateway check.
steps: Run focused pytest coverage for the restored `/model` behavior and runtime provider-switch wiring.
Repair the user's polluted `~/.nanobot/config.json` default model after the command-path fix lands.
Restart the existing tmux gateway and verify a real `/model list` request now shows selectable models instead of switching to model `list`.
